blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,049 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 32".
